theme_and_archetype.rationale: For an OCR translation tool handling physical supply chain bills, a light theme reflects the reality of paper documents. The Swiss & High-Contrast archetype emphasizes authority, data clarity, and objective truth, turning a mundane utility into a premium enterprise experience. It prioritizes function over decoration.

rules: No generic sans-serifs (Inter, Roboto, Space Grotesk) for headings.
Use JetBrains Mono for data points like OCR confidence scores, file sizes, and transaction IDs.
Headlines must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter).
Overlines must be uppercase with wide tracking.
Use #002FA7 (International Klein Blue) exclusively for primary CTAs (Upload, Translate, Download PDF).
Never use pure black or pure white without intention. The contrast between #FFFFFF (surface) and #F7F7F7 (background base) creates structural hierarchy.
Ensure text meets APCA standards. All text on accent_primary must be white.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

dashboard_grid.mode: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
dashboard_grid.rules: Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children to stretch to match neighbors.

dashboard_cards.description: Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse layout style. Items have right and bottom subtle borders. Flat background, no shadows.

upload_zone.description: A dynamic dashed border or glowing animated edge to signify the dropzone is active and waiting for input. Use framer-motion for smooth state transitions.

header.description: Solid white background with a hard bottom border (1px border-border). Not glassmorphism, keeping the data-centric clinical feel.

shadcn: Button (for all CTAs, customize with sharp edges/zero radius)
Tabs (for switching between Single and Batch upload modes)
Badge (for language source/target and OCR status)
Progress (for translation and PDF generation loading states)

custom_instructions.cards: Go cardless where possible. Rely on strict grid boundaries and 1px borders instead of drop-shadow cards.
custom_instructions.edges: Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm) to match the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic.
custom_instructions.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react). They feel more technical and constructed.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) is forbidden for this archetype. Instead, rely on background color shifts and border darkening.
motion_and_interactions.upload_animation: Micro-interaction: When a file is uploaded, show a simulated 'scanning' laser line (using framer-motion) moving down the document.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use monospace terminal-like text updates (e.g., 'Extracting text...', 'Translating via LLM...', 'Generating PDF...') instead of a simple spinner.

saas_header_bg.usage: Use as a subtle hero or header background for the main dashboard welcome section. Set opacity low to keep text readable.

ocr_scanner_illustration.usage: Use as the primary visual for the empty state of the translation history or next to the main upload dropzone.

logistics_warehouse_bg.usage: Use in the login/auth split-screen on the image half.

paper_receipts_pile.usage: Use as a textured background for a promotional 'How it Works' section or a banner inside the app.

dashboard.description: The main command center. Left sidebar for navigation (History, Upload, Settings). Main area uses Control Room Grid.
components: Upload Widget (Spans 2 columns, uses tracing beam)
Quick Stats (Spans 1 column each: Total Translated, Last Upload)

history.description: A dense, data-heavy table view of past translations.
components: Shadcn Table with columns: Date, Filename, Original Language, Status, Actions (View/Download PDF)

viewer_modal.description: Split-screen dialog comparing original image and translated text side-by-side before PDF generation.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements must have a kebab-case, role-based data-testid attribute (e.g., 'upload-dropzone', 'translate-submit-btn', 'download-pdf-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text, especially JetBrains Mono data points, meets a 4.5:1 ratio against the off-white background.
